message:
fix(plan): Simplify SharedLabHandle spawn functions for fan-in DAG support (bd-164g)

Spawn functions (join, race, timeout) now use SharedLabHandle::join()
directly instead of reaching into inner handle fields. This supports
diamond-pattern DAGs where multiple parents share a child handle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
